operator_authority: Omar authorized completing steps 1-8 with full authority for clean canonical CallScore system.
current_system_verdict: Live HH production already satisfies operational cutover gates; no service restart, DB write, deploy, provider/payment mutation, or public send is required for this pass.
cutover_steps: Confirm restore rehearsal passes without production mutation.
Confirm systemd, Docker, PostgreSQL, public app, Workplane, GTM registry validations pass.
If all pass, declare current HH/CallScore state canonical without restart/deploy/DB write.
rollback_triggers: HH Read API health fails or source is not hh_read_api
Workplane status exits nonzero or loses CONTROLLED_FULL/OK equivalent readiness
PostgreSQL read-only probe fails or core row counts unexpectedly zero
secret scan finds trackable live secret material
operator issues STOP or rollback instruction
rollback_sequence: Do not write to D:; keep D as receipt/evidence source.
Use Hetzner snapshot 398616103 to restore/rebuild HH server if host-level rollback required.
For repo-only issues, revert the latest CallScore/workplane commit(s) rather than touching snapshot.
Restore env files from protected env vault or snapshot, verify sha256, never print values.
Start/enable services according to service-ledger.yaml only after verification.
Run public verify, Workplane status, DB read-only row probes, and GTM registry tests before re-opening autonomous lanes.
